'''ân-t-n-b''' ('''kanatneboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loofa|loofa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loofa|loofa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-t-n-b
|-
! Lemma
| kanatneboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
